Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
168 
MDCR_REIMBRSMT_TYPE_CD 
LABEL: 
Medicare Reimbursement Type Code 
DESCRIPTION: This code indicates the type of Medicare reimbursement. 
SHORT NAME: MDCR_REIMBRSMT_TYPE_CD 
LONG NAME: MDCR_REIMBRSMT_TYPE_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
IP header 
LT header 
OT header 
VALUES: 
01 = IPPS — Acute Inpatient Prospective Payment system
